/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -Wall -fPIC -ffast-math -O3 -fmacro-prefix-map=/home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/='' -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/spm_decode.dir/spm_decode_main.cc.o -o /home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/spm_decode   -L/home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/3rdparty/mlc_llm/3rdparty/tvm/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/3rdparty/mlc_llm/3rdparty/tvm/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64: libsentencepiece.a -lpthread
